name: lscolors
description: A zig library for colorizing paths according to LS_COLORS

releases.name: v0.2.0
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* update to zig 0.15.2 in 8d34d0b30beaf5860b4cbe2aa482d2acece6d817
* breaking: add base directory to LsColors.styleForPath in d2a032425207318c12f533223008d2fd3004731c

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ziglibs/lscolors/compare/v0.1.0...v0.2.0
